moment.title: Identified full‑page reload issue for client‑side filters
moment.summary: The team discovered that using native navigation APIs such as `window.location.href` or `history.pushState` caused full page reloads in the Redwood SDK (`rwsdk`), preventing lightweight server‑component (RSC) payloads for dynamic table filters. The problem was clarified as a server‑side redirect rather than a client‑side navigation, prompting the need for a different approach. [mchn://gh/issue/redwoodjs/sdk/552]

instruction: REPLAY TURN: Integrate the evidence into the spec. Focus on "Identified full‑page reload issue for client‑side filters". Once done, proceed to the next moment: curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $API_KEY" "$WORKER_URL/api/speccing/next?sessionId=055da02a-9597-48ef-9867-a0441db5d98b"
